judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the key execute_python step, the agent misinterpreted the filter “handled more than 0 cases” by including agents identified from any history since 2022-04-10 and all current case owners (not restricting “handled” to the last 4 quarters) and then arbitrarily chose the lexicographically first among many agents with zero transfers, leading it to return 005Wt000003NBcAIAW instead of the expected 005Wt000003NIliIAG.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly extracting Owner Assignment records and filtering to the last four completed quarters, the agent arbitrarily introduced a tie-breaker (execute_python function-call-12201629920697760739) by sorting candidates with the minimal transfer count (all zero) by handled_count and picking the top result (005Wt000003NFKoIAO), which adds an unrequested constraint and led to a different ID than the expected 005Wt000003NIliIAG.
B. Failure modes encountered:

FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
